name: cc-pensador
description: Pensador: PRD workflow skill and /pensador command for Claude Code. Guides LLMs through 8 sequential stages — PRD base, demand expansion, and brainstorm passes with specialized skills (requirements-clarity, backend-development, ui-ux-pro-max, frontend-design), then Codex refinement and AGY gap analysis — producing prd.md, userhistory.md, and comunication_json.md. All dialogue routes through AskUserQuestion.
